title: Native/ares RDP command-stream differential lane absent (analyzer guards are native-only)

history.note: S3 RDP native/ares command-stream differential lane BUILT: tools/fidelity/sense_rdp_sweep.sh + tools/fidelity/rdp_fingerprint.py. Wires both suspects (native GE007_TRACE_RDP_RENDER_MODES -> [RDP-MODE] fingerprint; ares MGB64_ARES_TRACE_RDP_COMMANDS via analyze_stock_rdp_command_stream.py --json). Self-tests green (seeded RDP-mode divergence caught), ROM/ares-free. Native capture verified: 22 distinct RDP configs on Dam --faithful. Registered in verify_manifest (tier-1 selftest + tier-3 --gate) and the loop S3 slot. Remaining for closure (Phase C): wire the ares RDP sidecar auto-capture and run the differential to zero un-triaged clusters across the gate:true routes.
